metadata.description: Investment analysis skills + price-alert pipeline + real-time SEC Form 4 insider-firehose with auto-enrichment for Claude Code. Top-down macro-aware framework, bilingual EN/CN, real data via yfinance + openinsider + FRED + SEC EDGAR. v2.1: insider alerts auto-include P/E, market cap, 52W context, and a 0-10 Smart Money Score; toggle via /enrich Telegram command. For personal-finance buy-side use (swing / position / LEAPS) — not HFT.

plugins.name: claude-investment-skills
plugins.description: 15 investment skills with pre-flight methodology (macro → insider → 3-tier → sizing → tax). Telegram alert pipeline (price-alert + Form 4 insider firehose) + optional Cloudflare Worker webhook for 1-3 sec NL chat. v2.1: Form 4 insider alerts now auto-include P/E + market cap + 52W context + 0-10 Smart Money Score; toggle via Telegram /enrich on|off.
